title: BanManager
description: The defacto plugin for Minecraft to manage punishments and moderate more effectively
body: # [![Home](https://banmanagement.com/images/banmanager-icon.png)](https://banmanagement.com) BanManager¥n#### The defacto plugin for Minecraft to manage punishments and moderate more effectively¥n¥n[![Home](https://github.com/BanManagement/BanManager-WebUI/blob/assets/welcome.png?raw=true)](https://demo.banmanagement.com)¥n¥n## Overview¥n- **Free.** Open source and free to use¥n- **Robust.** Used and battle tested by some of the largest Minecraft servers¥n- **Maintained.** Actively developed since 2012, 10+ years¥n- **Cross platform.** Supports Bukkit, Spigot, Bungeecord & Sponge¥n- **Feature rich.** An advanced punishment system, reports, appeals, network friendly and [website compatible](https://github.com/BanManagement/BanManager-WebUI)¥n- **Flexible.** [Fully customisable](https://banmanagement.com/docs/banmanager/configuration) with [extensive player permissions](https://banmanagement.com/docs/banmanager/permissions)¥n¥nTo learn more about configuration, usage and features of BanManager, take a look at [the website](https://banmanagement.com/docs/banmanager/configuration) or view [the website demo](https://demo.banmanagement.com).¥n¥n## Requirements¥n- Java 21+¥n- CraftBukkit/Spigot/Paper, BungeeCord, Fabric or Sponge for Minecraft 1.7.2+¥n- Optionally [MySQL or MariaDB](https://banmanagement.com/docs/banmanager/install#setup-shared-database-optional)¥n¥n## Installation¥n- Copy jar to mods (Fabric) folder¥n- For further instructions on how to support multiple servers [click here](https://banmanagement.com/docs/banmanager/install-network)¥n¥n## Commands¥nView [full list here](https://banmanagement.com/docs/banmanager/commands)¥n- `/ban <player> <reason>` - Permanently ban a player, requires permission, requires permission `bm.command.ban`¥n- `/tempban <player> <timeDiff> <reason>` - Temporarily ban a player, requires permission `bm.command.tempban`¥n- `/unban <player> [reason]` - Unban a player, requires permission `bm.command.unban`¥n- `/mute <player> <reason>` - Permanently mute a player, requires permission `bm.command.mute`¥n- `/tempmute <player> <timeDiff> <reason>` - Temporarily mute a player, requires permission `bm.command.tempmute`¥n- `/unmute <player> [reason]` - Unmute a player, requires permission `bm.command.unmute`¥n- `/banip <player || ip> <reason>` - Permanently ban an ip address or ip of a player, requires permission `bm.command.banip`¥n- `/tempbanip <player || ip> <timeDiff> <reason>` - Temporarily ban an ip address or ip of a player, requires permission `bm.command.tempbanip`¥n- `/unbanip <ip> [reason]` - Unban an ip address, requires permission `bm.command.unbanip`¥n- `/muteip <player || ip> <reason>` - Permanently mute an ip address or ip of a player, requires permission `bm.command.muteip`¥n- `/tempmuteip <player || ip> <timeDiff> <reason>` - Temporarily mute an ip address or ip of a player, requires permission `bm.command.tempmuteip`¥n- `/unmuteip <ip> [reason]` - Unmute an ip address, requires permission `bm.command.unmuteip`¥n- `/baniprange <cidr || wildcard> <reason>` - Permanently ban a cidr or wildcard ip range, e.g. 192.168.0.1/16 or 192.168.*.*, requires permission `bm.command.baniprange`¥n- `/tempbaniprange <cidr || wildcard> <timeDiff> <reason>` - Temporarily ban a cidr or wildcard ip range, requires permission `bm.command.tempbaniprange`¥n- `/unbaniprange <cidr || wildcard || player>` - Unban an ip range, requires permission `bm.command.unbaniprange`¥n- `/warn <player> <reason>` - Warn a player, requires permission `bm.command.warn`¥n- `/tempwarn <player> <timeDiff> <reason>` - Temporarily warn a player, requires permission `bm.command.tempwarn`¥n- `/dwarn <player>` - Delete the last warning a player received, requires permission `bm.command.dwarn`¥n- `/addnote <player> <message>` - Add a note against a player, requires permission `bm.command.addnote`¥n- `/notes [player]` - View notes of all online players or a particular player, requires permission `bm.command.notes`¥n- `/kick <player> <reason>` - Kick a player from the server, requires permission `bm.command.kick`¥n- `/nlkick <player> <reason>` - Kick a player from the server without logging the kick if kick logging enabled, requires permission `bm.command.nlkick`¥n- `/bminfo [player]` - Look up information of a player, requires permission `bm.command.bminfo`¥n- `/bmimport`, Check the [migration guides](https://banmanagement.com/docs/banmanager/migrations) for more information, requires permission `bm.command.import`¥n- `/bmexport <players || ips>` - Export bans to vanilla format, requires permission `bm.command.export`¥n- `/bmreload` - Reload plugin configuration and messages (excludes database connection info), requires permission `bm.command.reload`¥n- `/banlist [players || ipranges || ips]` - List all bans stored in memory, requires permission `bm.command.banlist`¥n- `/bmsync <local || external>` - Force the server to syncronise with the database, requires permission `bm.command.sync`¥n- `/bmclear <player> [banrecords || baniprecords || kicks || muterecords || notes || warnings]` - Clear all records of a player or specify a type, requires permission `bm.command.clear`¥n- `/bmdelete <banrecords || kicks || muterecords || notes || warnings> <ids>` - Delete specific records for a player based on ids from /bminfo, requires permission `bm.command.delete`¥n- `/bmactivity <timeDiff> [player]` - View recent activity of staff, or a particular player, requires permission `bm.command.bmactivity`¥n- `/alts <player || ip>` - List players which have the same ip address, requires permission `bm.command.alts`¥n- `/report <player> <reason>` - Report a player for rule breaking, logs their location and the actors location, as well as other data, requires permission `bm.command.report`¥n- `/reports` - Report management, executes list by default, requires permission `bm.command.reports`¥n- `/reports assign <ids> [player]` - Assign a report to a player, if none given assigns to self, requires permission `bm.command.reports.assign`¥n- `/reports close <ids> [/command || comment]` - Marks a report as closed, with an optional comment or command, requires permission `bm.command.reports.close`¥n- `/reports list [page] [state]` - Lists reports, requires permission `bm.command.reports.list`¥n- `/reports tp <id>` - Teleports you to where the report was created, requires permission `bm.command.reports.tp`¥n- `/reports unassign <ids>` - Unassigns reports from a player, requires permission `bm.command.reports.unassign`¥n- `/bmrollback <player> <timeDiff> [types]` - Allows rolling back malicious actions by a staff member, requires permission `bm.command.bmrollback`¥n- `/banname <name> <reason>` - Ban any players with the name specified, requires permission `bm.command.banname`¥n- `/tempbanname <name> <timeDiff> <reason>` - Temporarily ban a name, requires permission `bm.command.tempbanname`¥n- `/unbanname <name> [reason]` - Unban a name, requires permission `bm.command.unbanname`¥n- `/bmutils <duplicates||missingplayers>` - Utility commands to aid with resolving issues, requires permission `bm.command.bmutils`¥n- `/bmutils duplicates [UUID] [newName]` - Finds duplicate player names and allows manual updating of a player name, requires permission `bm.command.bmutils.duplicates`¥n- `/bmutils missingplayers` - Finds missing player records associated to punishments and creates them, requires permission `bm.command.bmutils.missingplayers`¥n¥n## Permissions¥nView [full list here](https://banmanagement.com/docs/banmanager/permissions)¥n¥n## Development¥n```¥ngit clone git@github.com:BanManagement/BanManager.git¥n```¥n¥n## Contributing¥nIf you'd like to contribute, please fork the repository and use a feature branch. Pull requests are warmly welcome.¥n¥n## Help / Bug / Feature Request¥nIf you have found a bug please [open an issue](https://github.com/BanManagement/BanManager/issues/new) with as much detail as possible, including relevant logs and screenshots where applicable¥n¥nHave an idea for a new feature? Feel free to [open an issue](https://github.com/BanManagement/BanManager/issues/new) or [join us on Discord](https://discord.gg/59bsgZB) to chat¥n¥n## License¥nFree to use under the [Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 2.0 UK: England & Wales](LICENCE)¥n
